name: EVP711
positioning: When the detection tool indicates an issue with the internal cells of the battery pack, technicians typically replace the entire module (as repairing individual cells is challenging and.
public_description:
When the detection tool indicates an issue with the internal cells of the battery pack, technicians typically replace the entire module (as repairing individual cells is challenging and time-consuming, hereby ref. to EVB624/ELB300 for cells balancing). After replacing the module, the EVP711 can be used for balancing. Once the voltage of the module is consistent, it can be installed into the vehicle.
During the balancing process with the balancer, it may take a considerable amount of time to complete. In such cases, you can use the EVP711 to charge the battery module first. When the voltage levels are approximately equal, use an equalizer(such as EVB624/ELB300) to balance the cell voltage consistency. Combining the use of the equalizer and the charge&discharge tool improves repair efficiency.
internal_notes: Zoho account: Launch. Source category: Battery Service. Official Launch reference: i-305.
